description: Upgrade plan to migrate project to latest LTS versions

tasks.description: Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4
tasks.reason: Migrating to the latest LTS versions ensures long-term support, improved security, better performance, and access to modern language features. Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 minimum and includes Spring Framework 6.x with Jakarta EE namespace migration.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to 21, Spring Boot to 3.4, Spring Framework to 6.x, and migrate javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces where applicable. Update all related dependencies to versions compatible with Spring Boot 3.4 and Java 21.
tasks.taskSummary: Successfully upgraded Java from 8 to 21 and Spring Boot from 2.7.18 to 3.4.5 (Spring Framework 6.x). Migrated javax.persistence.* and javax.validation.constraints.* to jakarta.* namespaces in Photo.java. Updated ojdbc8 to ojdbc11. Build passes and all unit tests pass.
